name: Tome of Holy Protection
description: Notes The Tome of Holy Protection (or “Prot”) grants Armored to yourself, which boosts effective defense by 50%. In addition, it gives a decent boost to stats when equipped. A maxed Priest will often have defenses in the 60+ range, which is comparable to a heavy armor class. (Note that Armored does not increase the In Combat threshold.)
effects: Party Effect: Healing [70/s] (+0.495 per DEF over 40) for 4.4 seconds Party Effect: Within 8 sqrs DEF Boost (+12 DEF) for 6 seconds Effect on Self: Armored for 6 (+0.1 per DEF over 40) seconds
